metadata.description: Name of the azd environment — used to name the resource group and derive a unique suffix.
Primary location for all resources.
Entra (Azure AD) tenant id for the shared app registration. Supply via: azd env set ENTRA_TENANT_ID <guid>.
Entra (Azure AD) application (client) id for the shared app registration. Supply via: azd env set ENTRA_CLIENT_ID <guid>.
Entra app client secret. Supply via: azd env set ENTRA_CLIENT_SECRET <value>. Never commit this value.

Optional public IP address allowed through resource firewalls so you can deploy from outside the VNet (e.g. your dev machine). Supply via: azd env set DEPLOYER_IP_ADDRESS <ip>. Leave empty for deny-all.
Client public IP addresses allowed to read the data lake over its public endpoint (e.g. Power BI report authors / gateway). Empty by default; supply via: azd env set DATA_LAKE_ALLOWED_IPS.
Entra user/group object ids granted Storage Blob Data Contributor on the data lake (e.g. report authors using Storage Explorer / Power BI Desktop). Empty by default.
Primary location for all resources.
Tags applied to all resources.
Short unique suffix for resource names.
Entra tenant id.
Entra application (client) id.
Entra app client secret.
Optional public IP address allowed through resource firewalls (e.g. the deployer machine). Empty disables the rule.
Client public IP addresses allowed to read the data lake (e.g. Power BI report authors / gateway).
Entra user/group object ids granted Storage Blob Data Contributor on the data lake (e.g. report authors using Storage Explorer / Power BI Desktop).
Location for the virtual network and private DNS resources.
Tags applied to all resources.
Short unique suffix for resource names.
Address space for the virtual network.
Subnet (delegated to Microsoft.App/environments) used for Function App VNet integration.
Subnet that hosts all private endpoints.
Key Vault name (3-24 chars, alphanumeric and dashes).
Location for the vault.
Tags applied to the vault.
Entra app client secret stored as the client-secret secret.
Resource id of the subnet that hosts the private endpoint.
Private DNS zone id for Key Vault (privatelink.vaultcore.azure.net).
Optional public IP address allowed through the firewall (e.g. the deployer machine). Empty disables the rule.
Private endpoint name.
Location for the private endpoint.
Tags applied to the private endpoint.
Resource id of the subnet that hosts the private endpoint.
Resource id of the target service (storage account, vault, namespace, ...).
Sub-resource (groupId) to connect to, e.g. blob, queue, table, dfs, vault, namespace.
Resource id of the private DNS zone that resolves this groupId.
Log Analytics workspace name.
Location for the workspace.
Tags applied to the workspace.
ADLS Gen2 storage account name (3-24 lowercase alphanumeric).
Location for the storage account.
Tags applied to the storage account.
Resource id of the subnet that hosts the private endpoints.
Private DNS zone id for blob (privatelink.blob.*).
Private DNS zone id for dfs (privatelink.dfs.*).
Resource ids of the Stream Analytics jobs allowed through the firewall (resource instance rules).
Optional public IP address allowed through the firewall (e.g. the deployer machine). Empty disables the rule.
Additional client public IP addresses allowed to read the data lake (e.g. Power BI gateway / report authors).
Private endpoint name.
Location for the private endpoint.
Tags applied to the private endpoint.
Resource id of the subnet that hosts the private endpoint.
Resource id of the target service (storage account, vault, namespace, ...).

Resource id of the private DNS zone that resolves this groupId.

Sub-resource (groupId) to connect to, e.g. blob, queue, table, dfs, vault, namespace.
Resource id of the private DNS zone that resolves this groupId.
Event Hubs namespace name.
Location for the namespace.
Tags applied to resources.
Resource id of the subnet that hosts the private endpoint.
Private DNS zone id for Event Hubs (privatelink.servicebus.windows.net).
Optional public IP address allowed through the firewall (e.g. the deployer machine). Empty disables the rule.
Private endpoint name.
Location for the private endpoint.
Tags applied to the private endpoint.
Resource id of the subnet that hosts the private endpoint.
Resource id of the target service (storage account, vault, namespace, ...).

azd service name (must match azure.yaml) — set as azd-service-name tag.
Function App name (globally unique, <=60 chars).
Location for resources.
Base tags applied to resources.
Short unique suffix for supporting resource names.
Log Analytics workspace resource id for Application Insights.
Key Vault name the Function App reads secrets from.
Service-specific app settings (TENANT_ID, CLIENT_ID, Key Vault references, etc.).
Python runtime version for Flex Consumption.
Resource id of the delegated subnet used for VNet integration.
Resource id of the subnet that hosts the private endpoints.
Private DNS zone id for blob (privatelink.blob.*).
Private DNS zone id for queue (privatelink.queue.*).
Private DNS zone id for table (privatelink.table.*).
Optional public IP address allowed through the host storage firewall (e.g. the deployer machine). Empty disables the rule.

siteConfig.appSettings: [concat(createArray(createObject('name', 'AzureWebJobsStorage__blobServiceUri', 'value', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', format('st{0}{1}', parameters('serviceName'), parameters('resourceToken'))), '2023-05-01').primaryEndpoints.blob), createObject('name', 'APPLICATIONINSIGHTS_CONNECTION_STRING', 'value', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Insights/components', format('appi-{0}-{1}', parameters('serviceName'), parameters('resourceToken'))), '2020-02-02').ConnectionString)), parameters('appSettings'))]

resources.name: [guid(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', format('st{0}{1}', parameters('serviceName'), parameters('resourceToken'))), resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('name')), variables('storageBlobDataOwnerRoleId'))]
